summary: Completed 4 working_set tasks: agent handoff payload schema, token_ledger.py, compute_router.py, blob emoji system (manifest + React component). Updated memory_record and precog_card schemas to v2. All tested and ready for integration.
decisions_made: Handoff payload schema extends existing handoff.schema.json (backward compatible)
Token ledger uses JSONL at memory/m0_episodic/token_ledger.jsonl per local_llama_design_v1 spec
Compute router defaults T0 (local), escalates on ring/size/pattern constraints
Blob emoji uses C1710/blobmoji CDN via jsDelivr (Apache 2.0), SVG→PNG→native fallback
Memory record v2 adds memoryType (M0-M6), ring, emotional, relationships, embedding, temporalDecay
Precog card v2 adds ring, computeTier, targetAgent, safetyGate fields
open_items: Wire BlobEmoji component into LanternView.tsx (replace emojiPalette array)
Integrate token_ledger.py into local agent loop (mercer_local_agent.ps1)
Integrate compute_router.py into MCP gateway routing layer
Cartographer GPU engine — HIGHEST PRIORITY, needs local hardware (Ben/Opus)
Tauri v2 shell around web UI + gateway

ring_state.R6: major work (handoff payload schema, compute router)
ring_state.R11: pending integration (next agent wires into Lantern + gateway)
